prayer.title: 🕊️ Morning Prayer
prayer.parsha_theme: blessing children, final words, lasting impact
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who opens the eyes of the blind — help me see opportunities today.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 1:3**: "He is like a tree planted by streams of water, yielding fruit in season."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 10:4**: "A slack hand causes poverty, but the hand of the diligent makes rich."
prayer.intention: Give me discernment between opportunities and distractions. Not everything good is good for me right now.
prayer.closing: Go in peace. Build with purpose. Return with gratitude.
